{{< include chapters/02-day1.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/03-day2.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/04-day3.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/16-money-script-day3.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/05-day4.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/06-day5.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/07-day6.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/08-day7.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/17-money-script-day7.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/09-reflection.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/10-situations.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/11-restart.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/12-resources.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/15-money-script.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/13-references.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/14-close.qmd >}}
